description: Safe-class Codex lanes are capped at 3 simultaneous active lanes — check slot availability before dispatch
rationale: LANE_CONCURRENCY_POLICY.md §10: Codex CLI ratified limit = 3 active lanes for safe work classes (Governance, Hygiene, Verification, Delivery/UI). Pre-dispatch gate: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ops/lane-maximizer.ts must show no DISPATCH_LIMIT findings.

description: Dangerous-class lanes (Runtime, Migration, Modeling, Data/Canonical) are always singleton — enforce exclusion before any new dispatch
rationale: LANE_CONCURRENCY_POLICY.md §10 ineligible work classes and §1 hard limits: Runtime, Migration, Modeling, and Data/Canonical are always singletons regardless of executor. A second concurrent lane of these types is a hard block.
